text:
Mr. Arlert was the father of Armin Arlert, husband of Mrs. Arlert and son of the Grandfather Arlert.

Personality

Mr. Arlert appeared to be a very courageous man, willing to risk his own life in order to escape beyond the Walls. The fact that he was able to design a hot air balloon that would carry him and his wife beyond the Walls indicates that he was a remarkably intelligent man.

History

Mr. Arlert and his wife were both killed by Military Police Brigade member Djel Sannes for attempting to escape the Walls.

Trivia

Mr. Arlert's design was debuted in the Attack on Titan Character Encyclopedia.
Mr. Arlert shares a birthday with Franz Kefka.
In Chapter 15, Armin claimed his father and mother were killed by Titans during the Operation to reclaim Wall Maria, it is unclear why he thought this when their attempt to leave Paradis on an air balloon occurred prior to the breach in the Walls.
